feature: Real-time Metrics Display - Social Media Analytics Tab
summary: Tested new real-time metrics display feature for connected social media platforms. All 13 backend API tests pass (100%). All frontend UI tests pass including Analytics tab, aggregate metrics cards, category breakdown, platform performance table with sparklines, and refresh functionality.

backend_api_tests.test: GET /api/social/metrics/dashboard returns aggregate metrics (followers, likes, comments, shares, impressions, reach, engagement)
Dashboard metrics includes platforms array with per-platform data
GET /api/social/metrics/platforms returns categories breakdown with 16 categories
Platform metrics includes per-platform data with daily_followers for sparklines
Platform metrics has growth_rate for growth indicators
Refresh metrics updates all connected platforms (120 refreshed)
Metrics are deterministic (same values for same user+platform)

frontend_tests.test: Social Media Dashboard loads at /social with all 5 tabs
Aggregate metrics cards display: Followers (8.2M), Likes (67.3M), Comments (10.8M), Shares (6.0M), Impressions (40.9M), Avg Engagement (6.6%)
Category Breakdown section shows 16 category cards with followers, engagement, growth
Platform Performance table shows 120 platform rows
Sparkline trend charts render (130 SVG polylines)
Growth indicators show green/red with up/down arrows
Refresh Metrics button triggers refresh and updates data
Platforms tab: search, filter by type, filter by status all working
Overview tab: displays Connected Platforms list
Create Post tab: platform select and content input present

dashboard_metrics_endpoint.description: Returns aggregate metrics: total_followers, total_likes, total_comments, total_shares, total_impressions, total_reach, avg_engagement, connected_count

platform_metrics_endpoint.description: Returns per-platform metrics with 7-day trend data (daily_followers, daily_engagement) and category summaries

refresh_metrics_endpoint.description: Refreshes metrics for all connected platforms and stores timestamp

analytics_tab_ui.aggregate_cards: 6 metric cards with formatted numbers (K/M suffixes)
analytics_tab_ui.category_breakdown: 16 category cards showing total_followers, avg_engagement, avg_growth
analytics_tab_ui.platform_performance: Table with 120 rows, sparkline trend charts, growth indicators

critical_code_review_comments: Metrics are generated deterministically using hash(user_id + platform_id) - consistent across requests
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
Frontend correctly uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Sparkline component renders 7-day trend data correctly
Growth indicators use green/red coloring with arrow icons
seed_data_creation: None - all 120 platforms pre-connected via bulk-connect. Metrics generated deterministically.

mocked_api.description: Social media platform metrics are generated via deterministic algorithm server-side, not fetched from live external APIs

context_for_next_testing_agent: Real-time metrics display feature complete. New endpoints: GET /api/social/metrics/dashboard (aggregate), GET /api/social/metrics/platforms (per-platform with categories), POST /api/social/metrics/refresh. Analytics tab on /social page shows aggregate cards, category breakdown, platform performance table with sparklines. All existing functionality (Platforms, Overview, Create Post, Posts tabs) still working.
